Description: If this record should be considered soft deleted; all columns excluding primary keys will be NULL if TRUE
Unique identifier for the appointment slot
Unique patient identifier
Date and time that the slot will start
Date and time that the slot will end

Date and time when the slot status was 'Arrived'
Date and time when the slot status was 'Send In'
Date and time when the slot status was 'Left'
Date and time when the slot status was 'Start Call' or 'Video - Start Call'
Date and time when the slot status was 'Telephone - Complete' or 'Video - Complete'
ID indicating the current status of the slot
Date and time the slot was set to the current status
Human readable description of the current_status_id (e.g. 'Slot Available', 'DNA', 'Left', etc.)
Description of the appointment status type (e.g. 'Face to Face (Surgery)', 'Telephone', 'Face to Face (Home Visit)', etc)

The organisation that this data was replicated from
